flagged_messages.message_text: ROW-1325: 'You going to pay or do I need to file contempt?' | ROW-1326: 'I'm tired of this conversation. If you don't start paying stuff when you're supposed to I'm filing contempt again and moving forward with automatically taking daycare out of your check' | ROW-1338: 'That's late which means in contempt' | ROW-1341: 'You gotta pay this stuff. I don't get what is so hard about it. If I have to take you to court again that's going to be more lawyer fees for you.'
flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: Second contempt filing threat cluster (same category as B-003 ROW-783). ADD-002 temporal rule: second instance in same category = Sev-1 (paper tiger trajectory beginning). ROW-1326 introduces 'I'm filing contempt AGAIN' — explicit reference to prior contempt filing, confirming this is a repeated pattern, not a novel threat. 'Moving forward with automatically taking daycare out of your check' adds wage-garnishment mechanism. ROW-1341 adds lawyer-fees-for-court-return threat: 'going to be more lawyer fees for you' — financial consequence framing. The pattern is establishing: Eli is late → Melissa threatens contempt → Eli pays → cycle repeats. The threat is recurring and has not yet been executed (no evidence of new contempt filing in the record). ADD-002: Sev-1 for repeat instance.

peripheral_flags.note: ROW-1168: 'School gets out at 1:30 dumbass. I just told you that over and over' — RF04-ADD-002 contemptuous intelligence attack. RF-04 primary.
ROW-1288: 'Milo need to go to a specialist cause he has an uncle/dad. That would be traumatic' — second predation framing (RF-04+RF-15 primary per ADD-001; RF-05 peripheral aggressive-tone only).

flagged_messages.context_notes: Pattern establishment: this is the second contempt-filing threat cluster in three batches. The 'filing contempt AGAIN' language confirms a prior contempt filing (the child support hearing referenced in CP1 context). The compliance mechanism is forming: Eli has paid after each prior threat (ROW-784-785 in B-003 confirms he was waiting for payday; ROW-1340/1347 confirm eventual payment). The legal threat produces eventual compliance.
flagged_messages.quote_excerpt: 'I'm filing contempt again and moving forward with automatically taking daycare out of your check' (ROW-1326)

arcs_promoted_this_batch: ARC-RF05-001: WATCHING → ACTIVE. Third distinct episode (B-002, B-003, B-004). Prior Sev-2 in B-003. Pattern confirmed as structural/recurring — compliance mechanism established.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: B-004 (Dec 2022–Jan 2023) marks ARC-RF05-001 promotion to ACTIVE. Three distinct episodes establish the legal-compliance-pressure pattern as structural. The 'filing contempt again' phrasing confirms the pattern predates this dataset (the prior contempt filing from the divorce/support proceedings). The arc is active with a clear compliance cycle: Eli delayed → Melissa threatens → Eli pays.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-04 B-004: second predation framing (ROW-1288). Per ADD-001: not RF-05 primary. B-004 conflict_ratio 0.21 — highest in early Phase A, consistent with the payment-dispute escalations.
